scores.correctness_notes: Comprehensive and accurate match to gold standard: correct bases list, multi-base format (omit top-level base, embed in platform entries), cross-compilation, architecture-independent, and explicit/shorthand forms. Minor difference: 'all' build-on example lists many arches vs gold's [amd64], but both are valid.
scores.hallucination_notes: Legacy 'bases' section includes unverified channel versions (18.04, 20.04, 22.04) not confirmed by gold standard. riscv64 listed as supported arch but gold standard's arch list omits it (though gold uses it in an example). These are plausible but unverified against the source material.
